blocks.heading: Build the page you need.
blocks.body: Start with a clear promise, then add the sections that make the idea feel real.

blocks.heading: Tell the story plainly.
blocks.body: Use this section for context, details, instructions, FAQs, policies, or anything that needs a little room.

items.title: First thing
items.text: A short explanation people can scan.

items.title: Second thing
items.text: Make it practical, specific, and easy to compare.

items.title: Third thing
items.text: Add a final reason this matters.
